pivot_moments.description: Triggered when Hayes responds to a question about the sticky note and mentions it may not be a murder threat.
pivot_moments.detection_condition: Player asked Hayes about the sticky note AND Hayes stress > 0.4

pivot_moments.description: Triggered when Dr. Collins confirms airway obstruction after the keycap trophy evidence is submitted.
pivot_moments.detection_condition: Evidence 'evidence_keycap_trophy' is submitted AND Collins has been questioned this session.

pivot_moments.description: Triggered when Victor's text message evidence is submitted.
Triggered when Martha's reel evidence is submitted.
